title: Scheduled Refresh Not Triggering or Showing Results
description: The scheduled refresh feature is not triggering and not showing results. The scheduled jobs that should automatically refresh data are failing silently, leaving users without updated data.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduled refresh jobs trigger at their configured times
Refresh results are displayed to the user after completion
Failed refresh jobs produce visible error messages or logs
middleware_changes: Debug and fix the scheduled refresh job trigger mechanism to ensure jobs execute on schedule and results are properly stored and displayed.
implementation_notes: Needs investigation into the scheduled job runner (likely Laravel scheduler/cron) to determine why jobs are not triggering. Check cron configuration, job queue, and result storage.
